_note: File purposes for the registry (.aspis/index/FILE_REGISTRY.yaml). 'files': exact relpath -> purpose (highest priority; register files that can't carry a docstring here). 'names': basename -> purpose. 'patterns': glob -> purpose. These extend/override the built-in defaults. Find gaps with: python .aspis/scripts/context/build_registry.py --check

files.src/aspis/data/catalog/runtime-hooks/cla: Claude runtime settings — wires the scope-guard PreToolUse hook
files.src/aspis/data/catalog/runtime-hooks/ope: OpenCode scope-guard plugin — blocks out-of-scope tool calls
